name: Out of Breath
overview: Ha Eun's girlfriend breaks up with her because she's scared of people knowing she's a lesbian. After a push from her best friend, Ha Eun meets Min Seo on a dating app. The two of them do all of the things on Ha Eun's list of dates that she never got to do with her ex. After spending time together, will Ha Eun be able to get over her ex and move on?

trailers.title: Teaser l Queer Web Series [OUT OF BREATH] (SOO NOT SUE)
숨이 벅차 메이킹 영상 [숨이 벅차ㅣ여성퀴어 웹드라마ㅣ수낫수]
